name: Avian Observatory API
description: FastAPI backend for the Avian Observatory acoustic bird-monitoring platform — full TensorFlow + BirdNET inference, model comparison, GIS, and biodiversity metrics.

BIRDDASH_AUTH_MODE.description: Auth mode. 'dev' is the permissive stub shipped with v1.0.0; switch to 'oidc' once a real identity provider is wired.

BIRDDASH_CORS_ALLOW_ORIGINS.description: Comma-separated list of allowed browser origins (e.g. the Vercel frontend URL). Set after the frontend URL is known.

_comment: Declarative manifest only — provisions nothing until an actual deploy. standard-2x (1 GB RAM) is RECOMMENDED for TensorFlow headroom: TF's baseline plus model loading and inference is likely to exceed a 512 MB dyno (R14/R15 memory events), though this has not been measured on Heroku — a smaller dyno may work for read-only/light use. Heroku injects DATABASE_URL from the Postgres add-on; api/settings.py reads it and normalises the scheme.
